Package org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.dialogs

Class EventBDialog

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jface.window.Window
org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.Dialog
org.eventb.internal.ui.eventbeditor.dialogs.EventBDialog
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.jface.window.IShellProvider
Direct Known Subclasses:
NewCarrierSetDialog, NewConstantDialog, NewDerivedPredicateDialog, NewEnumeratedSetDialog, NewEventDialog, NewVariableDialog, NewVariantDialog
public abstract class EventBDialog extends org.eclipse.jface.dialogs.Dialog
This class extends the Dialog class and provides an input dialog for new event with some local varialbes, guards and actSubstitutions.

    • addProposalAdapter

      protected void addProposalAdapter(IInternalElement element, IAttributeType attributeType, IEventBInputText input)
      Construct a content proposal adapter that can assist the user with choosing content for a Event-B Input Text.
      Parameters:
      element - element associated to the input
      attributeType - type of attribute associated to the input
      input - a Event-B Input Text
